name: ORG-34517
description: ORG-34517 is currently under investigation by Organon for the treatment of depression. It has potential to treat a number of diseases such as Cushing’s disease, hypertension, diabetes, glaucoma etc, in which the activity of metabolites corticosterone and cortisol is high.
mechanismOfAction: Org-34517 is a glucocorticoid antagonist which may have a potential in a number of diseases where there is excess corticosterone/cortisol activity. The drug acts by normalizing hyperactivity in the hypothalamus-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis.
